name: rtms-monorepo

scripts.backend:start: cd backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.mqtt:worker: cd backend && uv run python -m app.mqtt_worker
scripts.bridge:start: cd client-plc-bridge && uv run python main.py

description: RTMS (Real-Time Monitoring System) モノレポ
